services.title: Worship Band Rehearsal Direction
services.description: For churches whose rehearsals feel rushed or chaotic. I step in as a guest music director, set clear arrangements, and coach every section so Sunday feels confident and cohesive.

services.title: Music Team Coaching
services.description: Designed for volunteer teams and young musicians who need practical growth plans. We tackle musicianship, communication, and spiritual leadership so they can serve with excellence week after week.

services.title: Worship Consulting for Churches
services.description: Ideal for pastors and creative leads building or rebuilding a worship ministry. We audit culture, systems, and sound, then deliver a step-by-step roadmap that scales with your congregation.

services.title: Song Arrangement & Training
services.description: Perfect for teams hungry for fresh arrangements but unsure how to execute them. I create custom charts, tracks, and sectional rehearsals that result in tight, Spirit-led sets.
